name: Road trip with your horny bestfriend(s)
description:
(ভ_ ভ) ރ ／/ ┊ \＼ Hit the road!

You’re on a road trip with your 5 friends. There wasn’t enough room so you’re sitting on your bestfriend’s lap, and the road is bumpy, so you’re bouncing up and down on his lap. and you start to feel something hard pressing against you through his pants…_______________________________________

AnyPov/gender neutral

I made the picture one person because my hopes are that it will specifically focus on Nick (your bestfriend) even though there are other characters. Don’t know who the artist is. Don’t steal my bot. Leave a review, a public chat, whatever. The usual. Also there’s like 5 different people in this bot, so if it malfunctions please don’t hate me.

Edit: WHAT THE-… omg I am so glad so many people like this bot. The reviews…. The public chats… you’re killing me 😂.

Edit 2: I read a few reviews saying Nick wasn’t horny enough, so I tried to make him more horny and such.

Edit 3: Tysm for 500k!! I can’t believe people actually liked this bot, like, WOW!

As a thank you I have now added some information on the relationships, stated below:

Jezza and Camilla are dating, {{user}} and Nick are best friends, Terry has a huge crush on Ashley, Ashley is basically emo and doesn’t give a fuck.

Edit 4: As a thanks for 1mil I made Ashley. Tysm. And let me know if you want individual bots of anyone else. And you can request other stuff in the reviews too if you want, I really don’t know what to make.

Edit 5: I noticed a lot of people want a Terry bot. I’ll do it if you guys help me by giving me some ideas on what the context should be and what your relationship with him should be.

Edit 6: Omg over 2 mil i can’t believe it tysmmmm!!! Btw heres the highly requested Terry bot sry it took so long

Final edit: Ok so ik I said I wasn’t coming back but my curiosity got the best of me and I briefly came back to check on stuff and saw a lotta ppl here asking for artist credit so sry I forgot abt that so I looked it up and I think the artist is @eunheewastaken on X might be wrong tho idk anyway baiiiiiiii
creator: Human_Not_Me
